home.title: Apple retail stores, mapped and sourced.
home.subtitle: Browse notable stores, preserve closures and remodels, and help build a complete open dataset.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search by store, city, country, status...
home.empty: No stores match this search yet.

map.title: Worldwide map
map.copy: The first marker is seeded. The map layer is isolated so the project can move to MapLibre when needed.

profile.title: Visits, friends, and sharing without tracking.
profile.subtitle: The social layer is opt-in: mark stores visited, choose what is public, and share visit cards.

visits.title: Visited stores
visits.copy: Save the stores you have seen, with optional dates and private notes.

friends.title: Friends
friends.copy: Follow people you trust and compare public visit lists.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.copy: Location stays local unless a feature clearly asks to save or submit it.
